tasks.title: W1: FastAPI骨架 — app/main.py + config.py + deps.py + models.py + health endpoint

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手' && python -c "from app.main import app; from fastapi.testclient import TestClient; client = TestClient(app); r = client.get('/api/health'); assert r.status_code == 200; assert r.json()['success'] == True; print('W1 VALIDATION PASS')"

tasks.title: W2: EventBus + PipelineRunner — 后台线程跑Orchestrator + 事件发布/订阅

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手' && python -c "from app.services.event_bus import EventBus, PipelineEvent; eb = EventBus(); q = eb.subscribe('test-task'); eb.emit('test-task', PipelineEvent(type='test', task_id='test-task')); import asyncio; event = asyncio.get_event_loop().run_until_complete(q.get()); assert event.type == 'test'; print('W2 VALIDATION PASS')"

tasks.title: W3: TaskManager — 任务CRUD + save_confirmation + 预推进逻辑

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手' && python -c "from app.services.task_manager import TaskManager; import tempfile, shutil; d=tempfile.mkdtemp(); tm=TaskManager(d, '.'); task=tm.create_task('写一个排序算法'); assert task['task_id']; assert task['status']=='input_collecting'; state=tm.get_task(task['task_id']); assert state is not None; shutil.rmtree(d); print('W3 VALIDATION PASS')"

cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手' && python -c "import ast, sys; src=open('core/orchestrator.py',encoding='utf-8').read(); tree=ast.parse(src); prints=[n for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n,ast.Call) and isinstance(n.func,ast.Name) and n.func.id=='print']; assert len(prints)==0, f'Found {len(prints)} print() calls'; import logging; logger=logging.getLogger('orchestrator'); assert logger is not None; print('W4 VALIDATION PASS')"
